title: Charter v1
description: A portable, AI-readable, machine-validatable design system contract. See CHARTER.md for the normative specification.

$schema.description: URI of the Charter schema this document targets. Tooling MUST dispatch on this value to determine which spec version applies.

name.description: Human-readable identifier for the design system.

version.description: Version of the design system, in SemVer 2.0.0 form. This is the version of the content, not the version of the spec (which is implied by $schema).

tokens.description: Design tokens in W3C DTCG format. Groups may nest arbitrarily.

registry.description: Package, path, or URL where the design system's components live.

allowed.description: Component names permitted in produced UI. May include glob patterns.

forbidden.description: Component names or intrinsic elements that MUST NOT be used. Cannot be downgraded by severity.

rules.description: Enforcement policy. Each rule has a default; see CHARTER.md §5.2.

profiles.description: Named rule overlays. The profile's rules block shallow-merges over the top-level rules block when selected.

notes.description: Free-form human rationale. Preserved by all Charter tooling. MUST NOT be parsed as rules.

$value.description: Token value. May be a primitive, a composite object (e.g., typography), or a DTCG reference like {color.primary}.

$type.description: DTCG type. Conventional types include color, dimension, fontFamily, fontWeight, duration, cubicBezier, shadow, typography, gradient, border.

delta_e_threshold.description: Maximum CIEDE2000 perceptual color distance from the nearest token color.
